overall.description: High-quality Unreal Engine gameplay from Hogwarts Legacy featuring a tranquil castle courtyard with a central fountain, transitioning to third-person perspective of a Hufflepuff student walking through medieval castle gardens. The clip showcases historic stone architecture, lush vegetation, and ambient magical particle effects.

events.description: blue magical motes appear and float across the courtyard near the fountain
yellow magical motes emerge and drift along the ground near the flower beds

agents.ego_description: stationary viewpoint observing the tranquil fountain courtyard and ambient magical effects

entered.detail: large circular stone fountain with water and central statue
medieval stone walls with crenellations forming the courtyard perimeter
tall evergreen trees framing the left side of the courtyard
tall evergreen trees framing the right side of the courtyard
bushes with white blossoms lining the courtyard edges
purple flowering plants in the foreground left
ornate black iron street lamp in the foreground right

segments.scene_description: A peaceful castle courtyard scene dominated by a central circular fountain surrounded by cobblestone paving. Medieval stone ramparts enclose the space, with tall pine trees and flowering bushes adding greenery. Magical blue and yellow motes float through the air, creating an enchanted atmosphere. The camera remains stationary, capturing the tranquil environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding castle garden path with stone walls

events.description: perspective switches from static courtyard to third-person view following a student in robes
character passes a fellow student walking in the opposite direction on the path

agents.ego_description: student in black robes with yellow trim walking steadily along the winding garden path

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking past the ego character in the opposite direction

entered.detail: winding stone pathway with raised edges leading through the gardens
cylindrical medieval tower with narrow windows and conical roof
arched stone gateway leading to another part of the castle grounds
simple wooden bench beside the path

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to follow a Hogwarts student walking along a winding cobblestone path through castle gardens. A prominent round stone tower rises on the right, while the path curves toward a distant stone archway. The character passes another student walking in the opposite direction, continuing through the lush green landscape with scattered flowers and mature trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot transitions from a static, enchanted courtyard into a dynamic journey through the lush gardens of a medieval castle. It begins centered on a circular fountain surrounded by cobblestone paving and stone ramparts, where magical blue and yellow motes drift through the air amidst pine trees and flowering bushes. As the perspective shifts, the camera begins to follow a Hogwarts student walking along a winding cobblestone path that leads away from the courtyard. The scene then expands to reveal a prominent round stone tower on the right as the student passes another peer and continues toward a distant stone archway. Finally, the movement carries the viewer deeper into the greenery, passing scattered flowers and mature trees under the castle's historic architecture.
